pageTitle: Nursing Care and Medical Advice | Dove Cottage
heroImageAlt: A nurse supporting a patient during a care session
heroShortDescription: Expert nursing support and symptom management in a social home-from-home environment.
mainIntro1: Our care is person-centred, with each individual offered a personalised care plan based on their specific requirements and goals.
mainIntro2: Elements of this plan can include, but are not limited to, the following areas:

sectionImage1.alt: A nurse supporting a patient during a care session

nursingIntro: Our palliative nursing team are on hand to support with any of the following:

nursingList.text: Other nursing needs you may have that will be discussed with you with one of our nurses.

medicalBody: Individuals remain under the care of their GP during their time with us, however our fully trained nurses can offer medical advice and support with any symptoms or concerns you may be experiencing.
advocacyIntro: Our nursing team are here to offer support for you and your loved ones at any stage in your palliative journey. We will work with you to create a plan of care based on your individual needs which may include some of the following:

advocacyList.text: Family and carer support and signposting

additionalIntro: As a day patient here at Dove you also have access to the full range of our additional day services which are listed below:
referralIntro: To make a referral to our hospice please complete the
referralOutro: and someone will get in touch with you to discuss in more detail.
sideFormHint: Enquire about nursing care and medical advice or make a referral.
